name: nutricalc
description: Nutricalc — Formulação de Dietas na Nutrição Animal

scripts.setup-sqlite:win: cd node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 41.2.1 --arch x64 --platform win32 --force
scripts.setup-sqlite:linux: cd node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 41.2.1 --arch x64 --platform linux --force

author: José Carlos Arevalo Júnior
